notes_human: All required QiOS roots must exist.
Only canonical roots allowed.
DarkMatter paths cannot be moved or deleted by non-DM rules.
Git repository metadata is protected system infrastructure.
Obsidian vault configuration is protected system infrastructure.
Git ignore file is protected system infrastructure.
Environment file is protected (contains secrets, never committed).
Environment template is protected system infrastructure.
Cursor rules file is protected system infrastructure.
Canvas files are protected visual planning infrastructure.
Kanban board files are protected visual planning infrastructure.
All realms get the common subtree.
QiBusiness realm gets business-specific subtree.
Client template must mirror OS subset.
Client realms should mirror template; missing folders suggested/created when enabled.
Disabled realms are not routing targets.
Every canonical root folder must contain _readme.md.
Every realm root must contain _readme.md.
Canonical front matter required.
If qid is null, call qios_next_qid() RPC (wrapper for claim_qid()) to generate QID. QID becomes required for canonical nodes after Layer 5.
Visibility mask based on sensitivity/classification. UI reads this to hide stuff in client portals.
Worker health tables must exist. Infrastructure check (Layer 1: Dark Matter).
GINA Orchestrator must respond to health checks. Infrastructure check (Layer 1: Dark Matter).
Semantic ingestion queue must exist and be processing.
If sensitivity=internal AND classification=system_darkmatter, route confidence hard-cap to 0.10, destination forced to darkmatter/, no semantic mirroring to clients.
If classification in (legal_hold, personal_health), dedupe only byte-identical, semantic merges forbidden without human approval.
